response.original_title: Walt Disney Cartoon Classics Vol. 14: Halloween Haunts
response.overview: Pluto's Judgement Day (1935): Pluto falls asleep and dreams he is put on trial by a court of cats for chasing and tormenting them.Lonesome Ghosts (1937): Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck, and Goofy run a ghost-busting agency and get tricked into entering a haunted house by bored ghosts wanting to play pranks.Trick or Treat (1952): Donald Duck plays harsh tricks on his nephews (Huey, Dewey, and Louie), prompting them to enlist the help of a benevolent witch to teach him a lesson.
response.title: Walt Disney Cartoon Classics Vol. 14: Halloween Haunts
